changeSummary: New action_card for primitive fishing in survival situations. Covers passive weir construction, improvised hooks, dawn/dusk timing, field dressing, and cooking safety. sourceQuality: mixed. Warning: alternativeToGuideSlugs cross parentTopic boundaries — resolves as cluster grows.

New scenario_guide for emergency foraging. Covers 3-point identification rule, beginner edibles (dandelion, plantain, cattail), toxic lookalike warnings (Apiaceae/hemlock), Universal Edibility Test, and Poison Control response. sourceQuality: mixed. New preparedness_guide for long-term emergency food procurement. Covers tiered stockpile building (72hr → 2wk → 3mo), UGA Extension bulk quantities, active skill development (fishing, gardening, canning, foraging), and community food networks. sourceQuality: strong. Clean pass, no warnings.
